body:
# RumblingStone Campaign — Story Arc Reference (Agent Navigation)

Quick-lookup reference for AI agents needing campaign state, arc progression, and narrative context.
For full narrative details, see `campaign/lore/campaign-history.md`.

---

## CURRENT STATE (as of last update)

- **Party Level:** 13
- **Party Location:** Post-Hammerfist, preparing personal quests + march to Rethmar
- **Last Completed:** Arc 08 — Battle of Hammerfist (victory, heavy losses)
- **Active Quests:** P1 Hella's Sacred Forest, P2A Artemis's Invisible Tower, P2 Rhest, P2B Tordek's Tournament
- **Upcoming:** Personal quests (parallel) → Battle of Rethmar (5 phases)

---

## ARC INDEX (Sequential)

| Arc | Directory | Title | Levels | Status | Summary |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Pre-01 | *(unnumbered)* | Minotaur Lair | 6–7 | ✅ Done | Underdark entry; Maur defeated; Il Collezionista ESCAPED; Cristal Warriors |
| 00 | `00_Red Hand Of Doom/` | Red Hand Opening | 4–6 | ✅ Done | Drellin's Ferry assault; Thorik dies & is resurrected with Aegis Fang |
| Pre-02 | *(in 02 dir)* | Neverlight Grove / Fungi Tower | 7–8 | ✅ Done | Drow-modified myconid lab; Sonjak connection (undiscovered); portal to deeper levels |
| 01 | `01_LaMiniera/` | La Miniera (Ancient Mine) | 8 | ✅ Done | Grell Patriarch lair; Cristal Warriors in early mine rooms after portal arrival |
| 02 | `02_scaladossa-abbattor-funghi/` | Scaladossa (Skeletal Scaffold) | 8–9 | ✅ Done | Evil dwarven necromancer of Abbathor; **Ring of Chaotic Illumination found → bonds with Artemis** |
| 03 | `03_la Cittadella/` | La Cittadella | 9–10 | ✅ Done | Moradin temple; Undead Beholder; Corona clues; drow slavers + retriever (defeated) |
| 04 | `04_tomba_di_Belkram/` | Tomba di Belkram | 10–11 | ✅ Done | Cerebromorphosis crisis; Ring Dawn's Defiance activation; PrC rejection |
| 05 | `05_aa-stanza-runica/` | Stanza Runica | 11 | ✅ Done | Dwarven rune puzzle room |
| 06 | `06_Stanza-corona-di-adamantio/` | Crown Chamber | 11–12 | ✅ Done | Corona di Adamantio found; **Hella dies**; portal opened |
| 07 | `07_il Portale Della Forgia Eterna/` | Eternal Forge Portal | 12–13 | ✅ Done | Fire/Earth/Temporal planes; gem rituals; Hella resurrection; Therysol found |
| 08 | `08_La Battaglia Di Hammerfist/` | Battle of Hammerfist | 13 | ✅ Done | 4-session siege; 900 horde vs 300 dwarves; Rumbling Stones emerge; 210 dwarves killed |
| 09 | `09_Continuazione Arco Narrativo.../` | Post-Hammerfist & Rethmar | 13+ | 🔄 In Progress | Personal quests + Rhest + Torneo + Battle of Rethmar (74 files) |

---

## VILLAIN STATUS TRACKER

| Villain | Type | CR | Status | Last Seen | Arc |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Grell Patriarch | Aberration | ~8 | ☠️ Defeated | 01_LaMiniera | 01 |
| Maur | Underdark native | ~10 | ☠️ Defeated | Minotaur Lair | Pre-01 |
| Il Collezionista | Rakshasa | ~12 | 🏃 **ESCAPED** | Minotaur Lair → Drow alliance | Pre-01 → 09 |
| Undead Beholder | Undead | ~13 | ☠️ Defeated | 03_la Cittadella | 03 |
| Drow Sorcerer + Retriever | Drow slaver | ~11 | ☠️ Defeated | 03_la Cittadella | 03 |
| Fauci di Palude | Black Dragon (Adult Advanced) | 15 | 🏃 **ESCAPED** (gravely wounded) | Fled Battle of Hammerfist | 08 |
| Generale Grimjaw | Orog Fighter 10/Warlord 3 | 14 | ☠️/🏃 **Conditional** | Battle of Hammerfist | 08 |
| Gorthak il Trifronte | 3-Headed Ettin | 12 | ☠️/🏃 **Conditional** | Battle of Hammerfist | 08 |
| Sonjak | Drow Cleric Matrona | ~14 | 🔴 **ACTIVE** | Underdark/Surface ops | Pre-02 → 09 |
| Zalkatar | Illithid Warlock Drow | 13 | 🔴 **ACTIVE** | Invisible Tower (Dauth) | 09-P2A |
| Wyrmlord Saarvith | Fighter/Dragon Disciple | 12 | 🔴 **ACTIVE** | Lake Rhest ruins | 09-P2 |
| Regiarax | Adult Black Dragon | 13 | 🔴 **ACTIVE** | Lake Rhest | 09-P2 |
| Xal'thor | Illithid Commander (Psionic) | ~14 | 🔴 **APPROACHING** | With Githyanki fleet | 09-P2B |
| Azarr Kul | High Wyrmlord (half-blue-dragon) | 15 | 🔴 **ACTIVE** | With the horde | 09-P3 |
| Tyrgarun | Very Old Blue Dragon | 20 | 🔴 **ACTIVE** | With Azarr Kul | 09-P3 |
| Githyanki Dragon-Rider Faction | LE military | ~15 | 🔴 **APPROACHING** | En route to Dauth | 09-P2B |

---

## ALLY STATUS TRACKER

| Ally | Type | Status | Condition | Arc |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Re Thorek Hammerfist | Dwarf King (Fighter 15/Noble 2, CR 16) | Active | Survived siege; 90 dwarves remain; named PCs Custodi Eterni | 08–09 |
| Dana Forgiapietra | Madre Superiora (Cleric 12/Divine Singer 3, CR 14) | Active | Survived siege; leads healing | 08–09 |
| Cantitrici della Pietra | 5 Bard/Clerics (CR 11 each) | Active | Group ability: Coro della Montagna | 08 |
| Signore Ventolesto | Celestial Giant Owl (CR 8) | Allied | Departed after Hammerfist; may return | 08 |
| 12 Ranger Elfici su Gufi | Elf Rangers (CR 8) | Allied | Departed; some wounded | 08 |
| Orion Pelleorsa | Druid 14 (CR 14) | Allied | Departed north after Hammerfist | 08 |
| Maestro Tempestas | Bard 12/Archmage 2 (CR 14) | Allied | Departed after Hammerfist | 08 |
| Therysol | Tiefling Half-Dragon NPC | Active | Underground, seeking revenge on Il Collezionista's guild | 07 → 09 |
| Moradin | Divine patron | Active | Speaks through Crown/Aegis artifacts | All |
| Circle of Eight Mages | 8 archmages | Arriving | Create mythal barrier at Rethmar | 09-P3 |
| Druid Circle | Nature druids | Conditional | Help only if Hella passes Sacred Forest ritual | 09-P1 |
| Tiri Kitor Elves | Wild elf scouts | Conditional | Help only if Starsong Hill quest completed | 09-P3 |
| Ghostlord (Lich) | LN Lich | Negotiable | Can become ally or enemy depending on party choices | 09-P3 |

---

## ARTIFACT STATUS

| Artifact | Owner | Status | Key Detail |
|---|---|---|---|
| Aegis Fang | Thorik | Active (pre-full awakening) | Becomes +4 Sacred Returning after full Corona awakening |
| Corona di Adamantio | Thorik | Active (3/3 gems lit) | Topaz ✅, Emerald ✅, Ruby ✅ (activated at year -1000 battle) |
| Ring of Chaotic Illumination | Artemis | Reforged | Full powers after Eternal Forge; further evolution at Invisible Tower |
| Bracieri Gemelli di Moradin | Tordek | Fire ✅ / Earth ✅ | Both phases complete |
| Collana dei Semi Eterni | Hella | Active (post-resurrection) | Treant summoning, Avatar form, party sacrifice gifts |
| Cuore di Moradin | Crown set | Activated | Separate artifact at Altare; enabled resurrection ritual |
| Orbe delle Otto Porte | Tordek (scenic) | At Tournament | Naruto-style chakra gate artifact: +2 STR/DEX morale per gate, 1d4 CON drain cumulative, final gate = disintegration |

---

## FUTURE ARC SUMMARY (What's Next)

```
[COMPLETED] Arcs 00–08 (Underdark + Eternal Forge + Hammerfist Battle)
    ↓
[CURRENT] Post-Hammerfist Personal Quests (Arc 09, parallel):
    ├── P1: Hella — Sacred Forest druid ritual (Avatar transformation)
    ├── P2A: Artemis — Invisible Tower (vs Zalkatar CR 13, Ring evolution)
    ├── P2: Rhest — Sunken City (Wyrmlord Saarvith + Regiarax Black Dragon CR 13)
    ├── P2B: Tordek — Tournament at Dauth (Otto Porte chakra gates + Githyanki attack)
    │   └── Day 3 interrupted by Githyanki Red Dragon + Xal'thor Illithid Commander
    └── P3 Alliances: Starsong Hill elves, Ghostlord negotiation, Sabotaggio Drow
    ↓
Battle of Rethmar (Arc 09-P3, 5 Phases):
    Phase 0: Night of the Drow (temple sabotage — Sonjak/Il Collezionista faction)
    Phase 1: Siege (horde + Giants + Githyanki + drow; multiple dragon colors)
    Phase 2: Draconic ritualists (10-round Avatar of Tiamat summoning)
    Phase 3: Azarr Kul (CR 15) + Tyrgarun Very Old Blue Dragon (CR 20)
    Phase 4: Circle of Eight Mythal (7 rounds) + animated city statues
```

---

## BRANCHING DECISIONS (DM Reference)

### Hella Resurrection
- **Yes:** Party proceeds at full STR; Hella gains Treant Hybrid template, Collana dei Semi Eterni
- **No:** Party continues with 3 PCs; Hella's artifact powers are lost; druid circle cannot be recruited

### Tordek Tournament Outcome
- **Win:** 150 dwarf mercenaries sent as reinforcements to Rethmar; chakra enlightenment
- **Interrupted by Githyanki:** Tournament becomes combat encounter; Githyanki dragon-rider faction STR at Rethmar depends on outcome here

### Hella Sacred Forest Ritual
- **Pass:** Druid circle offers nature power at Rethmar (summons, shapeshifting warriors)
- **Fail:** Circle remains neutral; no nature allies at final battle

### Artemis vs Zalkatar
- **Zalkatar defeated:** Ring reaches Ultimate Chaos form; no illithid interference at Rethmar
- **Zalkatar escapes:** Ring powers partially awakened; Zalkatar may appear as wildcard at Rethmar

### Night of the Drow Artifact
- **Defended:** Temple strong, morale high; Avatar of Tiamat weakened
- **Stolen:** Avatar +2 RI, +20 HP; Mythal effectiveness reduced
- **Destroyed:** Avatar loses catalyst; Circle of Eight Mythal strengthened

---

## CROSS-REFERENCES

| Need to know about... | Load file |
|---|---|
| Party stats and combat details | `references/campaign-party.md` |
| Artifact mechanics and synergies | `references/campaign-artifacts.md` |
| Cannath Vale map and locations | `references/fr-cannath-vale.md` |
| All factions (canonical + custom) | `references/fr-factions.md` |
| DM tools, quests, monster art | `references/dm-expansion-toolkit.md` |
| Full narrative history | `campaign/lore/campaign-history.md` |
| House rules | `campaign/lore/house-rules.md` |
